_comment: Owner-maintained: cards DROPPED ENTIRELY from the app. These are first-edition (v1, FFG/early-AMG) cards with NO current-edition (v2) equivalent — the 2.0 app is v2-only (Feature 13). Unlike unreleased.json `noImage` (which keeps the card and shows a branded placeholder), slugs listed here are FILTERED OUT at store load, so they never appear in Browse / Build / Reference. Scrape-proof static overlay (like unreleased.json / upgrade-weapons.json). Keyed by category -> [slugs]. Also holds cards whose required unit is not yet released (e.g. an upgrade for an upcoming character) — kept hidden until the unit ships, then filled in. To restore/reveal a card, remove its slug here.
